settings.always_show_header_toggle_label: Always show the theme switch button on the forum header
settings.always_show_header_toggle_help: By default the header button is only shown to guests. Enable this to also show it to logged-in users (they always have the toggle in their user menu regardless).
settings.solid_icon_label: Show theme icon in solid style
settings.solid_icon_help: Uses solid Font Awesome icons instead of the regular (outline) style for the theme toggle.
